web_results.title: Next Supreme Leader of Iran election - Wikipedia
web_results.description: An election for the third supreme leader of Iran will be held following the end of the current tenure of Ali Khamenei. As of January 2026, no person has been officially declared as the heir to Khamenei nor as a nominee, though various sources such as Reuters and BBC News have reported on potential ...

news_results.title: 'Not worried at all': Killing Khamenei would not trigger collapse of regime, Iran's Araghchi says
news_results.description: "Our system does not depend on individuals. It is supported by the people. So I am not worried at all. Even in the middle of war, nothing collapsed," Araghchi said.

news_results.title: Iran Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei runs 'state within state' shadow apparatus | Fox News
news_results.description: New analysis argues that eliminating Iran's supreme leader alone would not weaken the regime, as his office has created an extensive institutional apparatus.

news_results.title: Iran rejects ‘fictional narratives’ of power grab after protest killings | Protests News | Al Jazeera
news_results.description: Former President Hassan Rouhani denies reports he wants to replace Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, blames US and Israel.

news_results.title: Ayatollah Khamenei's Politics of Martyrdom Means Iran Won't Surrender to Trump's United States
news_results.description: Iran’s leader is unlikely to ever accept surrender to the United States.
